title: dactylorhiza majalis subsp. elatior
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. elatior, also known as the tall marsh orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. elatior include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Dactylorhiza majalis subsp. elatior can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
